title: Pipe chart shows full run — no clipped end sphere
description:
The Pipe chart was still cutting off the bottom (To) manhole because shaft height used the full panel and ignored the From/To end spheres. Track height now reserves space for both end nodes so the full pipe (From → shaft → To) fits in the panel without a scrollbar.

Who is affected: PipeShare Pipe chart on BASE after deploy; SaaS after Push.
changeLog: Pipe chart track height subtracts From/To node heights so the end sphere is not clipped.
Refine track size after layout and shrink if content still overflows.
Prefer CSS zoom over transform:scale so fit does not clip the bottom.
